conversations.content: Today we studied the Hengli Heavy Industry Workshop Safety Production Code. If an operator removes the protective guard of a stamping press while it is running...
Removing the guard while running? They're playing with their life! Is it a first offense?
And equipment sensors have recorded that this operator has a history of two or more violations.
Two or more violations and still hasn't learned? What can the team leader do this time?

then the team leader has the authority to transfer them from the position and reduce their salary by 30%, or order them to retake safety training and pass an exam before returning to the job, during which they will only receive minimum living expenses.

think: Hengli Heavy Industry safety: operator removes guard while press running + sensor records 2+ prior violations → transfer position + 30% pay cut OR retake safety training + exam (minimum living expenses during period).
memory: Hengli Heavy Industry Workshop Safety Production Code: If an operator removes the protective guard of a stamping press while it is running, and equipment sensors have recorded that the operator has a history of two or more violations, then the team leader has the authority to transfer them from the position and reduce their salary by 30%, or order them to retake safety training and pass an exam before returning to the job, during which they will only receive minimum living expenses.
